title: Discuss → web chat (James) → brief auto-linked onto card.briefPath

tests.summary: 14 passed: buildDiscussUrl (/embed/web-channel-default + mode=james + opaque context); briefStem/briefRelPath card-unique (briefs/<cardId>-<slug>.md); two same-title cards get different brief paths (no cross-link); recordBrief safe-path guards

e2e.summary: LIVE: FINDING 3 — Open web chat URL /embed/web-channel-default?mode=james&context=<blob> loads the web channel chat surface in the running Garrison (HTTP 200, not 'fitting not found'). FINDING 4 — placing briefs/<cardId>-add-sso.md then moving the card discuss→plan auto-set card.briefPath to that exact card-unique path, no manual POST

codexReview.notes: r1: auto-link keyed only on title slug → could attach another card's brief; fixed by card-unique briefStem=<cardId>-<slug> in both buildDiscussUrl + briefRelPath, with a same-title regression test; r2 approve

codexPwTest.summary: codex sandbox cannot launch Chromium; web channel embed + auto-link verified via repo Playwright + live HTTP

by: vision review of the live web channel surface
designAudit.notes: Open web chat lands on the generic web channel (James mode); the channel stays generic — the board does the brief linking

video.notes: shot 01-open-web-chat-james (web channel loaded in the running Garrison at /embed/web-channel-default)
